title: Welcome to Kabaddiadda
text: Welcome to Kabaddiadda — the all-in-one platform to run kabaddi tournaments, from your village ground to the big league. Let's walk through it, start to finish.

title: The homepage
text: This is the homepage. Fans discover tournaments and follow live scores here, while organisers run everything behind the scenes. Let's create an organiser account.

title: Step 1 · Register
text: Open the sign-up page to create your free account. It takes less than a minute.

title: Choose your role
text: Pick Organiser, since we're going to run a tournament.

title: Your details
text: Enter your full name, your email, and a password of at least eight characters.

title: Create your account
text: Click Create account. There's no email confirmation step — you are signed in instantly.

title: Set up your league
text: First, name your league and pick a plan — Free gets you going instantly. Your league is your public identity on Kabaddiadda.

title: Your dashboard
text: Welcome to your organiser dashboard. This is your home base for tournaments, teams, and live matches.

title: Step 2 · Create a tournament
text: Let's create your first tournament. Open the tournaments section and start a new one.

title: Tournament details
text: Give it a name — the web address fills in automatically. Choose a format, like league or knockout, and set the dates.

title: Create it
text: Click Create tournament, and your tournament is live.

title: Step 3 · Add teams
text: Every tournament needs teams. Open the Teams tab to add them.

title: Add your first team
text: Type the team name, a short code, a city, and a colour. Then click Add team.

title: Add another team
text: Add a second team the same way. You need at least two to schedule a match.

title: Step 4 · Add players
text: Click a team to open its roster.

title: Build the squad
text: Add each player with their name, jersey number, and role — raider, defender, or all-rounder. Repeat until your squad is complete.

title: Step 5 · Schedule a match
text: Now head to Fixtures to schedule a match.

title: Create the fixture
text: Pick the home and away teams, choose the date and time, and click Add match.

title: Open your match
text: Open the match to start scoring. You get two modes.

title: Normal scoring
text: For a quick, casual match, tap Quick start — Normal scoring. No line-ups required — you are live in one tap.

title: Tap to score
text: Just tap under the team that scored — raid, bonus, tackle, or all-out. Made a mistake? Undo fixes it instantly.

title: Advanced live scoring
text: For full matches, Advanced scoring tracks every player on the mat — with line-ups locked in.

title: Outs and revivals
text: Pick the raider, tap the defenders touched, and the engine handles outs, revivals, and all-outs automatically, by the official rules.

title: The public live page
text: Fans follow every point on the public live page, updating in real time.

title: Broadcast overlay
text: And this transparent overlay drops straight into your live stream for a professional broadcast.

title: You're ready!
text: That's the whole journey — register, build your tournament, add teams and players, and score live. Welcome to Kabaddiadda. Now go run your tournament!
